data.title: Distributed System Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp uses a distributed architecture to handle millions of simultaneous connections across different regions.
data.technical_spec: Microservices with data sharding and replication

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures user privacy by encrypting messages between devices.

data.title: Reliable Message Queuing
data.description: WhatsApp implements robust message queuing to ensure message delivery, even during network disruptions.

data.title: Real-Time Messaging Protocols
data.description: Optimizes for low-latency message transmission across networks.

data.title: Multi-Device Synchronization
data.description: Supports users in accessing their messages across multiple devices.
